testcase.name: test_recipe_status_becomes_pending

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'pending' or 'done', got 'error' assert 'error' in ['pending', 'done']

testcase.failure: tests/test_new_features.py:103: in test_recipe_status_becomes_pending assert data["transcription_status"] in ["pending", "done"], f"Expected 'pending' or 'done', got '{data['transcription_status']}'" E AssertionError: Expected 'pending' or 'done', got 'error' E assert 'error' in ['pending', 'done']

testcase.name: test_poll_until_ai_generation_complete

failure.message: Failed: AI generation failed: Errore AI: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.ServiceUnavailableError: ServiceUnavailableError: OpenAIException - upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers. reset reason: remote connection failure, transport failure reason: delayed connect error: Connection refused

testcase.failure: tests/test_new_features.py:128: in test_poll_until_ai_generation_complete pytest.fail(f"AI generation failed: {data.get('transcription')}") E Failed: AI generation failed: Errore AI: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.ServiceUnavailableError: ServiceUnavailableError: OpenAIException - upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers. reset reason: remote connection failure, transport failure reason: delayed connect error: Connection refused

testcase.name: test_verify_recipe_persisted_in_db
testcase.failure: tests/test_new_features.py:160: in test_verify_recipe_persisted_in_db assert data["transcription_status"] == "done" E AssertionError: assert 'error' == 'done' E E - done E + error
